welcome.description: Master essential communication techniques through real-world scenarios. Learn to de-escalate conflicts, show empathy, and serve your community with excellence.
welcome.heroSubtitle: Master essential communication techniques through real-world scenarios. Learn to de-escalate conflicts, show empathy, and serve your community with excellence.
welcome.chooseScenario: Choose a scenario below to begin

scenarios.title: Choose Your Training Scenario
scenarios.subtitle: Complete scenarios to earn badges and improve your skills

game.retryNegative: That approach escalated the situation. Let's try a different approach that shows more empathy and de-escalation.
game.retryNeutral: That was adequate but not optimal. Consider how you might build more rapport while maintaining professional boundaries.
game.confirmLeave: Are you sure you want to leave? Your progress in this scenario will be lost.

review.title: 🏆 Training Session Review
review.wellDone: Well done on completing this scenario!

reviewManager.duringScenario: during this scenario. Here's what to remember:

custom.addSub: Create, upload and play your own scenario
custom.chooserLead: Create your own training scenario, or upload a ready-made file and play it with your group.
custom.uploadHint: Upload a scenario file (and optionally a review file). The structure is validated before saving.

footer.disclaimer: Views and opinions expressed are however those of the author(s) only and do not necessarily reflect those of the European Union or the Czech National Agency (DZS). Neither the European Union nor the granting authority can be held responsible for them.
footer.liability: This game is training material, not legal advice. The POL-COM consortium gives no warranty as to the factual or legal accuracy of the scenarios and accepts no liability for how they are used. Verify the content against the law and procedures of your own jurisdiction before using it in training.
footer.contactCta: Found a bug, or something factually or legally wrong? Tell us.

contact.open: Report a bug or contact us
contact.title: Report a bug or contact us
contact.messagePlaceholder: Describe what happened, or what is wrong and where.
contact.emailLabel: Your e-mail (optional, so we can reply)
contact.note: This opens your e-mail app with the message prepared. Nothing is sent from this page and no data is stored here.
